market_pulse: EDC Week dominates all venues with heavy DJ bookings; LIV leads social engagement with Tiësto/David Guetta residency; competitors focusing on Latin/R&B theming (OMNIA Deseo Sundays, Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesdays).

content_gaps.description: OMNIA running #deseolatinsundays (5/10, 5/12 confirmed) targeting Latin audience; Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesdays gaining traction on TikTok.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Consider Latin/Reggaeton showcase at LIV for diversification; test with guest DJ + cross-promote to Spanish-language influencers.

content_gaps.description: Competitors getting strong #outfit and #clubfit TikToks; LIV has user content but could amplify more.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch TikTok UGC hashtag challenge targeting club fit creators; offer guest list incentives for video submissions.

content_gaps.description: Major DJs getting featured in individual posts; smaller creators not being highlighted as regularly.
